en: Yeah.
You want the truth?
Yeah, I want the truth.
I don't think so.
With all of us or just, um...
with all of you.
That's a real nice attitude, Claire.
Oh, be honest, Andy.
If Brian came walking up to you in the hall on Monday,
ko: 만약 브라이언이 월요일에 복도에서 너에게 다가온다면,

en: what would you do?
I mean, picture this. You're there with all the sports.
ko: 상상해봐. 너는 모든 스포츠와 함께 있어.

en: I know exactly what you'd do.
You'd say hi to him, and when he left,
you'd cut him all up so your friends wouldn't think that you really liked him.
ko: 친구들이 네가 그를 정말 좋아한다고 생각하지 않도록 그를 헐뜯을 거야.

en: No way.
Yeah.
What if I came up to you?
The same exact thing.
You are a bitch!
Why? Because I'm telling the truth? That makes me a bitch?
ko: 왜? 내가 진실을 말한다고? 그게 나쁜 년이 되는 거야?

en: No. Because you know how shitty that is to do to someone.
ko: 아니. 누군가에게 그렇게 하는 게 얼마나 나쁜지 알면서도.

en: And you don't got the balls to stand up to your friends
ko: 그리고 너는 친구들 앞에서 당당히 서서

en: and tell them that you're gonna like who you wanna like.
ko: 네가 좋아하고 싶은 사람을 좋아한다고 말할 용기가 없어.

en: Okay, what about you, you hypocrite?
Why don't you take Allison to one of your heavy metal vomit parties?
ko: 왜 앨리슨을 너의 헤비메탈 구토 파티에 데려가지 않아?

en: Or take Brian out to the parking lot at lunch and get high?
ko: 아니면 점심시간에 브라이언을 주차장으로 데려가서 기분 좋게 해?
